name: dashboard
summary: Renders the #dashboard hash route. Shows the active provider grid (one card per enabled provider with model count + key status) and the recent activity feed (collapsed to last 5 by default, expandable to last 50).

failure_modes.handling: renderCurrentView() error boundary catches the throw and replaces #upContent with .up-crash-card showing the stack trace
Activity panel renders an empty-state hint; not a crash
